labels.ja: 協調ロールと委任モジュール

definitions.en: models coordination roles, delegation contracts, handoffs, agents-as-tools, authority scope, context isolation, ownership, worker selection, and delegation budgets
definitions.zh: 协同角色与委派模块属于控制与编排域，用于描述编排者、工作者、子智能体、交接、把智能体作为工具调用、上下文隔离、授权范围、责任归属、工作者选择和委派预算。
definitions.ja: 協調ロールと委任モジュールは制御とオーケストレーションドメインに属し、調整役、作業者、サブエージェント、引き継ぎ、エージェントを道具として呼び出す形、文脈隔離、権限範囲、責任帰属、作業者選択、委任予算を記述します。

purpose.zh: 本模块在“协同角色与委派模块”边界内，以 DelegationProcess governed_by DelegationContract 为代表闭包，把概念层级、语义关系和节点内信息组织成可查询、可验证的一张统一图。
purpose.en: Within the Coordination Roles And Delegation Module boundary, this Module uses DelegationProcess governed_by DelegationContract as a representative closure fact and organizes taxonomy, semantic relations, and node information as one queryable, verifiable graph.
purpose.ja: 協調ロールと委任モジュールの境界内で、DelegationProcess governed_by DelegationContract を代表閉包事実とし、分類・意味関係・ノード内情報を検索・検証可能な単一グラフとして組織します。

includes.zh: 本模块直接拥有 25 个概念和 27 条 source-owned 关系；定义、字段、约束、实例、引用和解释附着在对应 canonical 节点或关系上。
includes.en: 25 directly owned Concepts and 27 source-owned relations; definitions, fields, constraints, instances, citations, and explanations are attached to the corresponding canonical node or relation.
includes.ja: 本モジュールが直接所有する 25 個の概念と 27 本の source-owned 関係。定義・項目・制約・インスタンス・引用・説明は対応する canonical ノードまたは関係に付属します。

excludes.zh: 兄弟模块拥有的概念，以及与主图并行的 schema 图、实例图或案例影子图；跨模块语义只通过 canonical ID 和唯一关系事实引用。
excludes.en: Concepts owned by sibling Modules and any schema, instance, or case shadow graph parallel to the primary graph; cross-Module meaning is referenced only through canonical IDs and one relation fact.
excludes.ja: 兄弟モジュール所有の概念、および主グラフと並行する schema・instance・事例のシャドーグラフ。モジュール横断意味は canonical ID と一つの関係事実だけで参照します。

not_applicable_reason.zh: 协同角色与委派模块当前没有已接受的 canonical failure 关系；本发布将该项明确标为不适用，而不以字段或示例伪造一条边。
not_applicable_reason.en: Coordination Roles And Delegation Module has no accepted canonical failure relation in this release; the facet is explicitly not applicable instead of being fabricated from fields or examples.
not_applicable_reason.ja: 協調ロールと委任モジュールには本リリースで承認済み canonical failure 関係がなく、項目や例から辺を捏造せず明示的に非適用とします。

not_applicable_reason.zh: 协同角色与委派模块当前没有已接受的 canonical recovery 关系；本发布将该项明确标为不适用，而不以字段或示例伪造一条边。
not_applicable_reason.en: Coordination Roles And Delegation Module has no accepted canonical recovery relation in this release; the facet is explicitly not applicable instead of being fabricated from fields or examples.
not_applicable_reason.ja: 協調ロールと委任モジュールには本リリースで承認済み canonical recovery 関係がなく、項目や例から辺を捏造せず明示的に非適用とします。

decision_note.zh: 编排者、子智能体角色与工作者统一建模为协调角色，调用式委派和任务分发是委派过程的种类，答案/控制/委派归属是协调归属记录；合同、事件、结果、预算和上下文通过关系闭环，不伪装为过程子类。
decision_note.en: Orchestrator, subagent role, and worker are modeled as coordination roles; tool-like delegation and task distribution specialize delegation process, while answer, control, and delegation ownership specialize coordination ownership records. Contracts, events, results, budgets, and context close the loop through relations rather than false process subtyping.
decision_note.ja: オーケストレーター、サブエージェント役割、ワーカーを調整役割として統一し、道具型委任とタスク配分を委任プロセスの種類とする。回答・制御・委任の帰属は調整所有記録であり、契約、イベント、結果、予算、文脈は関係で閉ループ化する。

decision_note.zh: 编排者、子智能体角色与工作者统一建模为协调角色，调用式委派和任务分发是委派过程的种类，答案/控制/委派归属是协调归属记录；合同、事件、结果、预算和上下文通过关系闭环，不伪装为过程子类。

Contracts, events, results, budgets, and context close the loop through relations rather than false process subtyping.

descriptions.zh: MWA-217 的 DelegationProcess 把补丁实现交给受 DelegationContract 和预算约束的修复执行者，并将补丁摘要作为 DelegationResult 返回。 本地解释复用已接受关系 DelegationProcess-governed_by-DelegationContract, constrained_by_budget, DelegationProcess-produces-DelegationResult。
descriptions.en: For MWA-217, DelegationProcess assigns patch implementation to a repair worker governed by DelegationContract and budget, then returns the patch summary as DelegationResult. This local explanation reuses accepted relations DelegationProcess-governed_by-DelegationContract, constrained_by_budget, DelegationProcess-produces-DelegationResult.
descriptions.ja: MWA-217 では、DelegationProcess が DelegationContract と予算で統制された修復担当へパッチ実装を委任し、パッチ要約を DelegationResult として返します。 この局所説明は承認済み関係 DelegationProcess-governed_by-DelegationContract, constrained_by_budget, DelegationProcess-produces-DelegationResult を再利用します。

expected_result.zh: 委派结果绑定 call-defect-MWA-217-apply-patch，且责任与预算可审计。
expected_result.en: The delegation result is bound to call-defect-MWA-217-apply-patch with auditable responsibility and budget.
expected_result.ja: 委任結果は call-defect-MWA-217-apply-patch に結び付き、責任と予算を監査できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 这是 MWA-217 同一案例的模块内解释；DelegationProcess-governed_by-DelegationContract, constrained_by_budget, DelegationProcess-produces-DelegationResult 连接既有 canonical 节点，缺陷事实只作为节点内信息。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: This is an in-module explanation of the same MWA-217 case: DelegationProcess-governed_by-DelegationContract, constrained_by_budget, DelegationProcess-produces-DelegationResult connects existing canonical nodes and defect facts remain inline information.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 同じ MWA-217 事例のモジュール内説明です。DelegationProcess-governed_by-DelegationContract, constrained_by_budget, DelegationProcess-produces-DelegationResult は既存 canonical ノードを接続し、欠陥事実はノード内情報として保持します。

labels.ja: エージェント道具呼び出し

short_definitions.zh: 智能体作为工具调用是管理者保留控制权和答案归属的一种有界委派过程。
short_definitions.en: Agent-as-tool invocation is a DelegationProcess distinguished by the manager retaining control and answer ownership.
short_definitions.ja: AgentAsToolInvocation は管理者が制御権と回答帰属を保持する DelegationProcess である。

definitions.zh: 智能体作为工具调用是管理者保留控制权和答案归属的一种有界委派过程。
definitions.en: Agent-as-tool invocation is a DelegationProcess distinguished by the manager retaining control and answer ownership.
definitions.ja: AgentAsToolInvocation は管理者が制御権と回答帰属を保持する DelegationProcess である。

why_needed.zh: 智能体作为工具调用为canonical 事实 retains_answer_ownership（AgentAsToolInvocation retains_answer_ownership AnswerOwnership）提供明确端点并保持与 TaskDistribution 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: agent as tool invocation provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact retains_answer_ownership (AgentAsToolInvocation retains_answer_ownership AnswerOwnership) while preserving its reviewed boundary from TaskDistribution.
why_needed.ja: エージェント道具呼び出しはcanonical 事実 retains_answer_ownership（AgentAsToolInvocation retains_answer_ownership AnswerOwnership）の明確な端点を提供し、TaskDistribution との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的智能体作为工具调用：智能体作为工具调用是管理者保留控制权和答案归属的一种有界委派过程。；该种差可由关系 retains_answer_ownership 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes agent as tool invocation records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Agent-as-tool invocation is a DelegationProcess distinguished by the manager retaining control and answer ownership. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in retains_answer_ownership.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たすエージェント道具呼び出しを含みます：AgentAsToolInvocation は管理者が制御権と回答帰属を保持する DelegationProcess である。 種差は関係 retains_answer_ownership の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 任务分发虽与本概念同属 DelegationProcess，但其定义为“任务分发是把工作项分配给选定执行者并保留范围证据的一种委派过程。”，不得替代智能体作为工具调用。
excludes.en: TaskDistribution shares parent DelegationProcess, but its reviewed definition is “TaskDistribution is a DelegationProcess distinguished by assigning work items to selected performers with scope evidence.”; it must not be substituted for AgentAsToolInvocation.
excludes.ja: TaskDistribution は同じ上位 DelegationProcess を持ちますが、審査済み定義は「TaskDistribution は範囲証拠を保持して作業項目を選択された実行者へ割り当てる DelegationProcess である。」であり、AgentAsToolInvocation の代用にはできません。

labels.zh: 智能体作为工具调用正例
labels.en: Positive example of agent as tool invocation
labels.ja: エージェント道具呼び出しの正例

descriptions.zh: 在可核验图谱片段中，AgentAsToolInvocation 以自身 canonical ID 参与canonical 事实 retains_answer_ownership（AgentAsToolInvocation retains_answer_ownership AnswerOwnership）；该记录不与边界对照项 TaskDistribution 混用。智能体作为工具调用是管理者保留控制权和答案归属的一种有界委派过程。
descriptions.en: In a verifiable graph fragment, AgentAsToolInvocation participates in canonical fact retains_answer_ownership (AgentAsToolInvocation retains_answer_ownership AnswerOwnership) under its own canonical ID; the record is not conflated with boundary contrast TaskDistribution. Agent-as-tool invocation is a DelegationProcess distinguished by the manager retaining control and answer ownership.
descriptions.ja: 検証可能なグラフ断片で、AgentAsToolInvocation は自身の canonical ID によりcanonical 事実 retains_answer_ownership（AgentAsToolInvocation retains_answer_ownership AnswerOwnership）へ参加します。境界対照 TaskDistribution と混同しません。AgentAsToolInvocation は管理者が制御権と回答帰属を保持する DelegationProcess である。

expected_result.zh: 查询必须解析到 retains_answer_ownership 的 AgentAsToolInvocation 端点，并通过该节点的字段与种差校验。
expected_result.en: The query must resolve AgentAsToolInvocation as an endpoint of retains_answer_ownership and validate the node's fields and differentia.
expected_result.ja: 照会は retains_answer_ownership の端点として AgentAsToolInvocation を解決し、ノードの項目と種差を検証しなければなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 示例复用真实端点和关系 retains_answer_ownership，没有用名称相似性替代关系或类型断言。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The example reuses the actual endpoints and relation retains_answer_ownership; name similarity does not substitute for a relation or type assertion.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: この例は実在する端点と関係 retains_answer_ownership を再利用し、名称類似性で関係または型アサーションを代替しません。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed retains_answer_ownership relation from AgentAsToolInvocation to AnswerOwnership. The ontology-specific boundary for retains_answer_ownership is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > LangGraph Graph API heading and documented conceptual model

labels.zh: 智能体作为工具调用边界例
labels.en: Boundary case for agent as tool invocation
labels.ja: エージェント道具呼び出しの境界例

descriptions.zh: TaskDistribution 用作AgentAsToolInvocation的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 TaskDistribution 的已审查定义是“任务分发是把工作项分配给选定执行者并保留范围证据的一种委派过程。”。不能因 shared parent DelegationProcess 而把它归入AgentAsToolInvocation。
descriptions.en: TaskDistribution is the boundary contrast for AgentAsToolInvocation. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but TaskDistribution's reviewed definition is “TaskDistribution is a DelegationProcess distinguished by assigning work items to selected performers with scope evidence.”. shared parent DelegationProcess does not make it a AgentAsToolInvocation.
descriptions.ja: TaskDistribution は AgentAsToolInvocation の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、TaskDistribution の審査済み定義は「TaskDistribution は範囲証拠を保持して作業項目を選択された実行者へ割り当てる DelegationProcess である。」です。shared parent DelegationProcess だけで AgentAsToolInvocation にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: TaskDistribution 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 AgentAsToolInvocation。
expected_result.en: TaskDistribution retains its own type; validation must not promote it to AgentAsToolInvocation from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: TaskDistribution は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで AgentAsToolInvocation へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 retains_answer_ownership 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of retains_answer_ownership; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、retains_answer_ownership の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

decision_note.zh: 智能体作为工具调用是管理者保留控制权和答案归属的一种有界委派过程。
decision_note.en: Agent-as-tool invocation is a DelegationProcess distinguished by the manager retaining control and answer ownership.
decision_note.ja: AgentAsToolInvocation は管理者が制御権と回答帰属を保持する DelegationProcess である。

short_definitions.zh: 答案归属记录在委派、交接、审查或综合之后，哪个协同参与者对最终答复或产物负责。
short_definitions.en: records which coordinating actor is accountable for the final response or artifact after delegation, handoff, review, or synthesis.
short_definitions.ja: 回答帰属は、委任、引き継ぎ、レビュー、統合の後で、どの協調参加者が最終回答または成果物に責任を持つかを記録します。

definitions.en: records which coordinating actor is accountable for the final response or artifact after delegation, handoff, review, or synthesis.
definitions.zh: 答案归属记录在委派、交接、审查或综合之后，哪个协同参与者对最终答复或产物负责。
definitions.ja: 回答帰属は、委任、引き継ぎ、レビュー、統合の後で、どの協調参加者が最終回答または成果物に責任を持つかを記録します。

why_needed.zh: 答案归属为canonical 事实 retains_answer_ownership（AgentAsToolInvocation retains_answer_ownership AnswerOwnership）提供明确端点并保持与 ControlOwnership 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: answer ownership provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact retains_answer_ownership (AgentAsToolInvocation retains_answer_ownership AnswerOwnership) while preserving its reviewed boundary from ControlOwnership.
why_needed.ja: 回答帰属はcanonical 事実 retains_answer_ownership（AgentAsToolInvocation retains_answer_ownership AnswerOwnership）の明確な端点を提供し、ControlOwnership との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的答案归属：答案归属记录在委派、交接、审查或综合之后，哪个协同参与者对最终答复或产物负责。；该种差可由关系 retains_answer_ownership 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes answer ownership records satisfying this reviewed differentia: records which coordinating actor is accountable for the final response or artifact after delegation, handoff, review, or synthesis. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in retains_answer_ownership.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす回答帰属を含みます：回答帰属は、委任、引き継ぎ、レビュー、統合の後で、どの協調参加者が最終回答または成果物に責任を持つかを記録します。 種差は関係 retains_answer_ownership の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 控制归属虽与本概念同属 CoordinationOwnershipRecord，但其定义为“控制归属记录当前由哪个参与者控制下一步工作流，包括管理者保留控制或通过交接转移控制。”，不得替代答案归属。
excludes.en: ControlOwnership shares parent CoordinationOwnershipRecord, but its reviewed definition is “records which actor currently controls the next workflow step, including whether control is retained by a manager or transferred through handoff.”; it must not be substituted for AnswerOwnership.
excludes.ja: ControlOwnership は同じ上位 CoordinationOwnershipRecord を持ちますが、審査済み定義は「制御帰属は、次のワークフロー手順を現在どの参加者が制御するかを記録し、管理者が保持する場合と引き継ぎで移転する場合を区別します。」であり、AnswerOwnership の代用にはできません。

descriptions.zh: 在可核验图谱片段中，AnswerOwnership 以自身 canonical ID 参与canonical 事实 retains_answer_ownership（AgentAsToolInvocation retains_answer_ownership AnswerOwnership）；该记录不与边界对照项 ControlOwnership 混用。答案归属记录在委派、交接、审查或综合之后，哪个协同参与者对最终答复或产物负责。
descriptions.en: In a verifiable graph fragment, AnswerOwnership participates in canonical fact retains_answer_ownership (AgentAsToolInvocation retains_answer_ownership AnswerOwnership) under its own canonical ID; the record is not conflated with boundary contrast ControlOwnership. records which coordinating actor is accountable for the final response or artifact after delegation, handoff, review, or synthesis.
descriptions.ja: 検証可能なグラフ断片で、AnswerOwnership は自身の canonical ID によりcanonical 事実 retains_answer_ownership（AgentAsToolInvocation retains_answer_ownership AnswerOwnership）へ参加します。境界対照 ControlOwnership と混同しません。回答帰属は、委任、引き継ぎ、レビュー、統合の後で、どの協調参加者が最終回答または成果物に責任を持つかを記録します。

expected_result.zh: 查询必须解析到 retains_answer_ownership 的 AnswerOwnership 端点，并通过该节点的字段与种差校验。
expected_result.en: The query must resolve AnswerOwnership as an endpoint of retains_answer_ownership and validate the node's fields and differentia.
expected_result.ja: 照会は retains_answer_ownership の端点として AnswerOwnership を解決し、ノードの項目と種差を検証しなければなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 示例复用真实端点和关系 retains_answer_ownership，没有用名称相似性替代关系或类型断言。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The example reuses the actual endpoints and relation retains_answer_ownership; name similarity does not substitute for a relation or type assertion.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: この例は実在する端点と関係 retains_answer_ownership を再利用し、名称類似性で関係または型アサーションを代替しません。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed retains_answer_ownership relation from AgentAsToolInvocation to AnswerOwnership. The ontology-specific boundary for retains_answer_ownership is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.

excludes.ja: AnswerOwnership は同じ上位 CoordinationOwnershipRecord を持ちますが、審査済み定義は「回答帰属は、委任、引き継ぎ、レビュー、統合の後で、どの協調参加者が最終回答または成果物に責任を持つかを記録します。」であり、ControlOwnership の代用にはできません。

descriptions.zh: 在可核验图谱片段中，ControlOwnership 以自身 canonical ID 参与canonical 事实 ControlOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord（ControlOwnership is_a CoordinationOwnershipRecord）；该记录不与边界对照项 AnswerOwnership 混用。控制归属记录当前由哪个参与者控制下一步工作流，包括管理者保留控制或通过交接转移控制。
descriptions.en: In a verifiable graph fragment, ControlOwnership participates in canonical fact ControlOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord (ControlOwnership is_a CoordinationOwnershipRecord) under its own canonical ID; the record is not conflated with boundary contrast AnswerOwnership. records which actor currently controls the next workflow step, including whether control is retained by a manager or transferred through handoff.
descriptions.ja: 検証可能なグラフ断片で、ControlOwnership は自身の canonical ID によりcanonical 事実 ControlOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord（ControlOwnership is_a CoordinationOwnershipRecord）へ参加します。境界対照 AnswerOwnership と混同しません。制御帰属は、次のワークフロー手順を現在どの参加者が制御するかを記録し、管理者が保持する場合と引き継ぎで移転する場合を区別します。

expected_result.zh: 查询必须解析到 ControlOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord 的 ControlOwnership 端点，并通过该节点的字段与种差校验。
expected_result.en: The query must resolve ControlOwnership as an endpoint of ControlOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord and validate the node's fields and differentia.
expected_result.ja: 照会は ControlOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord の端点として ControlOwnership を解決し、ノードの項目と種差を検証しなければなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 示例复用真实端点和关系 ControlOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord，没有用名称相似性替代关系或类型断言。

descriptions.zh: AnswerOwnership 用作ControlOwnership的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 AnswerOwnership 的已审查定义是“答案归属记录在委派、交接、审查或综合之后，哪个协同参与者对最终答复或产物负责。”。不能因 shared parent CoordinationOwnershipRecord 而把它归入ControlOwnership。
descriptions.en: AnswerOwnership is the boundary contrast for ControlOwnership. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but AnswerOwnership's reviewed definition is “records which coordinating actor is accountable for the final response or artifact after delegation, handoff, review, or synthesis.”. shared parent CoordinationOwnershipRecord does not make it a ControlOwnership.
descriptions.ja: AnswerOwnership は ControlOwnership の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、AnswerOwnership の審査済み定義は「回答帰属は、委任、引き継ぎ、レビュー、統合の後で、どの協調参加者が最終回答または成果物に責任を持つかを記録します。」です。shared parent CoordinationOwnershipRecord だけで ControlOwnership にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: AnswerOwnership 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 ControlOwnership。
expected_result.en: AnswerOwnership retains its own type; validation must not promote it to ControlOwnership from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: AnswerOwnership は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで ControlOwnership へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 ControlOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。

descriptions.zh: DelegationProcess 用作DelegationBudget的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 DelegationProcess 的已审查定义是“委派过程是委派者依据合同把有范围的工作、权限、上下文与预算交给代理角色执行，并接收可追踪结果而保持或转移明确归属的协调活动。”。不能因 relation DelegationBudget-constrains-DelegationProcess 而把它归入DelegationBudget。

short_definitions.zh: 委派契约规定委派工作、预期结果、授权范围、可见上下文、预算、完成准则以及委派方和受托方的归属边界。
short_definitions.en: specifies delegated work, expected result, authority scope, visible context, budget, completion criteria, and ownership boundaries between delegator and delegatee.
short_definitions.ja: 委任契約は、委任作業、期待される結果、権限範囲、可視文脈、予算、完了基準、委任者と受任者の帰属境界を定めます。

definitions.en: specifies delegated work, expected result, authority scope, visible context, budget, completion criteria, and ownership boundaries between delegator and delegatee.
definitions.zh: 委派契约规定委派工作、预期结果、授权范围、可见上下文、预算、完成准则以及委派方和受托方的归属边界。
definitions.ja: 委任契約は、委任作業、期待される結果、権限範囲、可視文脈、予算、完了基準、委任者と受任者の帰属境界を定めます。

why_needed.zh: 委派契约为canonical 事实 constrained_by_budget（DelegationContract constrained_by_budget DelegationBudget）提供明确端点并保持与 DelegationBudget 的定义边界；节点字段 delegation_id、status、created_at 使该区别可验证。
why_needed.en: delegation contract provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact constrained_by_budget (DelegationContract constrained_by_budget DelegationBudget) while preserving its reviewed boundary from DelegationBudget; node fields delegation_id, status, created_at make that distinction testable.
why_needed.ja: 委任契約はcanonical 事実 constrained_by_budget（DelegationContract constrained_by_budget DelegationBudget）の明確な端点を提供し、DelegationBudget との審査済み境界を保ちながら。ノード項目 delegation_id、status、created_at によりその区別を検証できます。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的委派契约：委派契约规定委派工作、预期结果、授权范围、可见上下文、预算、完成准则以及委派方和受托方的归属边界。；该种差可由字段 delegation_id、status、created_at 检验。
includes.en: Includes delegation contract records satisfying this reviewed differentia: specifies delegated work, expected result, authority scope, visible context, budget, completion criteria, and ownership boundaries between delegator and delegatee. The differentia can be checked through fields delegation_id, status, created_at.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす委任契約を含みます：委任契約は、委任作業、期待される結果、権限範囲、可視文脈、予算、完了基準、委任者と受任者の帰属境界を定めます。 種差は項目 delegation_id、status、created_at で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 委派预算只是关系 constrained_by_budget 的另一端；相关联不表示它是委派契约。
excludes.en: DelegationBudget is only the other endpoint of constrained_by_budget; relatedness does not make it a DelegationContract.
excludes.ja: DelegationBudget は constrained_by_budget のもう一方の端点にすぎず、関連するだけで DelegationContract にはなりません。

descriptions.zh: 在可核验图谱片段中，DelegationContract 以自身 canonical ID 参与canonical 事实 constrained_by_budget（DelegationContract constrained_by_budget DelegationBudget）；该记录不与边界对照项 DelegationBudget 混用。委派契约规定委派工作、预期结果、授权范围、可见上下文、预算、完成准则以及委派方和受托方的归属边界。
descriptions.en: In a verifiable graph fragment, DelegationContract participates in canonical fact constrained_by_budget (DelegationContract constrained_by_budget DelegationBudget) under its own canonical ID; the record is not conflated with boundary contrast DelegationBudget. specifies delegated work, expected result, authority scope, visible context, budget, completion criteria, and ownership boundaries between delegator and delegatee.
descriptions.ja: 検証可能なグラフ断片で、DelegationContract は自身の canonical ID によりcanonical 事実 constrained_by_budget（DelegationContract constrained_by_budget DelegationBudget）へ参加します。境界対照 DelegationBudget と混同しません。委任契約は、委任作業、期待される結果、権限範囲、可視文脈、予算、完了基準、委任者と受任者の帰属境界を定めます。

expected_result.zh: 查询必须解析到 constrained_by_budget 的 DelegationContract 端点，并通过该节点的字段与种差校验。
expected_result.en: The query must resolve DelegationContract as an endpoint of constrained_by_budget and validate the node's fields and differentia.
expected_result.ja: 照会は constrained_by_budget の端点として DelegationContract を解決し、ノードの項目と種差を検証しなければなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 示例复用真实端点和关系 constrained_by_budget，没有用名称相似性替代关系或类型断言。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The example reuses the actual endpoints and relation constrained_by_budget; name similarity does not substitute for a relation or type assertion.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: この例は実在する端点と関係 constrained_by_budget を再利用し、名称類似性で関係または型アサーションを代替しません。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed constrained_by_budget relation from DelegationContract to DelegationBudget. The ontology-specific boundary for constrained_by_budget is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > LangGraph Graph API heading and documented conceptual model

descriptions.zh: DelegationBudget 用作DelegationContract的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 DelegationBudget 的已审查定义是“委派预算设定令牌、时间、成本、重试、工具调用或上下文限制，用来约束委派工作和路由选择。”。不能因 relation constrained_by_budget 而把它归入DelegationContract。
descriptions.en: DelegationBudget is the boundary contrast for DelegationContract. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but DelegationBudget's reviewed definition is “sets token, time, cost, retry, tool-call, or context limits that constrain delegated work and routing choices.”. relation constrained_by_budget does not make it a DelegationContract.
descriptions.ja: DelegationBudget は DelegationContract の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、DelegationBudget の審査済み定義は「委任予算は、トークン、時間、費用、再試行、道具呼び出し、文脈の上限を設定し、委任作業と経路選択を制約します。」です。relation constrained_by_budget だけで DelegationContract にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: DelegationBudget 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 DelegationContract。
expected_result.en: DelegationBudget retains its own type; validation must not promote it to DelegationContract from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: DelegationBudget は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで DelegationContract へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 constrained_by_budget 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of constrained_by_budget; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、constrained_by_budget の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed constrained_by_budget relation from DelegationContract to DelegationBudget. The ontology-specific boundary for constrained_by_budget is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > LangGraph Graph API heading and documented conceptual model

descriptions.zh: DelegationProcess 用作DelegationEvent的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 DelegationProcess 的已审查定义是“委派过程是委派者依据合同把有范围的工作、权限、上下文与预算交给代理角色执行，并接收可追踪结果而保持或转移明确归属的协调活动。”。不能因 relation DelegationEvent-changes-DelegationProcess 而把它归入DelegationEvent。
descriptions.en: DelegationProcess is the boundary contrast for DelegationEvent. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but DelegationProcess's reviewed definition is “A DelegationProcess is a coordination activity in which a delegator assigns scoped work, authority, context, and budget under a contract to a delegate role and receives a traceable result with explicit retained or transferred ownership.”. relation DelegationEvent-changes-DelegationProcess does not make it a DelegationEvent.
descriptions.ja: DelegationProcess は DelegationEvent の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、DelegationProcess の審査済み定義は「DelegationProcess は委任者が契約に基づき範囲付き作業、権限、文脈、予算を代理役割へ割り当て、明示された保持・移転帰属と共に追跡可能な結果を受け取る調整活動である。」です。relation DelegationEvent-changes-DelegationProcess だけで DelegationEvent にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: DelegationProcess 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 DelegationEvent。
expected_result.en: DelegationProcess retains its own type; validation must not promote it to DelegationEvent from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: DelegationProcess は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで DelegationEvent へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 DelegationEvent-changes-DelegationProcess 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of DelegationEvent-changes-DelegationProcess; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、DelegationEvent-changes-DelegationProcess の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed changes relation from DelegationEvent to DelegationProcess. The ontology-specific boundary for DelegationEvent-changes-DelegationProcess is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation > Agents, tasks, crews, flows, and processes

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed distinction of DelegationEvent: A delegation event temporally starts, updates, cancels, or completes delegation; it affects a process but is not a subtype of that process. The ontology-specific boundary for DelegationEvent is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation > Agents, tasks, crews, flows, and processes

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed distinction of DelegationEvent: A delegation event temporally starts, updates, cancels, or completes delegation; it affects a process but is not a subtype of that process. The ontology-specific boundary for DelegationEvent is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Overview > Durable execution, human-in-the-loop, memory, and subgraphs

decision_note.zh: 委派事件是启动、更新、取消或完成委派的时间发生项；它影响过程但不是过程的一种。
decision_note.en: A delegation event temporally starts, updates, cancels, or completes delegation; it affects a process but is not a subtype of that process.
decision_note.ja: DelegationEvent は委任を開始、更新、取消、完了する時間的発生項であり、プロセスに影響するがその下位型ではない。

change_note.zh: 委派事件是启动、更新、取消或完成委派的时间发生项；它影响过程但不是过程的一种。
change_note.en: A delegation event temporally starts, updates, cancels, or completes delegation; it affects a process but is not a subtype of that process.
change_note.ja: DelegationEvent は委任を開始、更新、取消、完了する時間的発生項であり、プロセスに影響するがその下位型ではない。

short_definitions.zh: 委派归属记录委派方与受托方之间的责任拆分，包括保留的答案归属、转移的控制权、授权范围和结果责任。
short_definitions.en: records the responsibility split between delegator and delegatee, including retained answer ownership, transferred control, authority scope, and result accountability.
short_definitions.ja: 委任帰属は、委任者と受任者の責任分担を記録し、保持される回答帰属、移転される制御、権限範囲、結果責任を含みます。

definitions.en: records the responsibility split between delegator and delegatee, including retained answer ownership, transferred control, authority scope, and result accountability.
definitions.zh: 委派归属记录委派方与受托方之间的责任拆分，包括保留的答案归属、转移的控制权、授权范围和结果责任。
definitions.ja: 委任帰属は、委任者と受任者の責任分担を記録し、保持される回答帰属、移転される制御、権限範囲、結果責任を含みます。

why_needed.zh: 委派归属为canonical 事实 DelegationOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord（DelegationOwnership is_a CoordinationOwnershipRecord）提供明确端点并保持与 AnswerOwnership 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: delegation ownership provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact DelegationOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord (DelegationOwnership is_a CoordinationOwnershipRecord) while preserving its reviewed boundary from AnswerOwnership.
why_needed.ja: 委任帰属はcanonical 事実 DelegationOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord（DelegationOwnership is_a CoordinationOwnershipRecord）の明確な端点を提供し、AnswerOwnership との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的委派归属：委派归属记录委派方与受托方之间的责任拆分，包括保留的答案归属、转移的控制权、授权范围和结果责任。；该种差可由关系 DelegationOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes delegation ownership records satisfying this reviewed differentia: records the responsibility split between delegator and delegatee, including retained answer ownership, transferred control, authority scope, and result accountability. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in DelegationOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす委任帰属を含みます：委任帰属は、委任者と受任者の責任分担を記録し、保持される回答帰属、移転される制御、権限範囲、結果責任を含みます。 種差は関係 DelegationOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 答案归属虽与本概念同属 CoordinationOwnershipRecord，但其定义为“答案归属记录在委派、交接、审查或综合之后，哪个协同参与者对最终答复或产物负责。”，不得替代委派归属。
excludes.en: AnswerOwnership shares parent CoordinationOwnershipRecord, but its reviewed definition is “records which coordinating actor is accountable for the final response or artifact after delegation, handoff, review, or synthesis.”; it must not be substituted for DelegationOwnership.
excludes.ja: AnswerOwnership は同じ上位 CoordinationOwnershipRecord を持ちますが、審査済み定義は「回答帰属は、委任、引き継ぎ、レビュー、統合の後で、どの協調参加者が最終回答または成果物に責任を持つかを記録します。」であり、DelegationOwnership の代用にはできません。

descriptions.zh: 在可核验图谱片段中，DelegationOwnership 以自身 canonical ID 参与canonical 事实 DelegationOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord（DelegationOwnership is_a CoordinationOwnershipRecord）；该记录不与边界对照项 AnswerOwnership 混用。委派归属记录委派方与受托方之间的责任拆分，包括保留的答案归属、转移的控制权、授权范围和结果责任。
descriptions.en: In a verifiable graph fragment, DelegationOwnership participates in canonical fact DelegationOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord (DelegationOwnership is_a CoordinationOwnershipRecord) under its own canonical ID; the record is not conflated with boundary contrast AnswerOwnership. records the responsibility split between delegator and delegatee, including retained answer ownership, transferred control, authority scope, and result accountability.
descriptions.ja: 検証可能なグラフ断片で、DelegationOwnership は自身の canonical ID によりcanonical 事実 DelegationOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord（DelegationOwnership is_a CoordinationOwnershipRecord）へ参加します。境界対照 AnswerOwnership と混同しません。委任帰属は、委任者と受任者の責任分担を記録し、保持される回答帰属、移転される制御、権限範囲、結果責任を含みます。

expected_result.zh: 查询必须解析到 DelegationOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord 的 DelegationOwnership 端点，并通过该节点的字段与种差校验。
expected_result.en: The query must resolve DelegationOwnership as an endpoint of DelegationOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord and validate the node's fields and differentia.
expected_result.ja: 照会は DelegationOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord の端点として DelegationOwnership を解決し、ノードの項目と種差を検証しなければなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 示例复用真实端点和关系 DelegationOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord，没有用名称相似性替代关系或类型断言。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The example reuses the actual endpoints and relation DelegationOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord; name similarity does not substitute for a relation or type assertion.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: この例は実在する端点と関係 DelegationOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord を再利用し、名称類似性で関係または型アサーションを代替しません。

short_definitions.en: observable result returned by a worker, subagent, tool-like agent, or remote delegate, including artifacts, status, warnings, and provenance.

short_definitions.zh: 交接是控制转移事件，把任务、对话、路由或运行状态的责任移交给另一智能体参与者或远程受托方。
short_definitions.en: control-transfer event that moves responsibility for a task, conversation, route, or runtime state to another agent actor or remote delegate.
short_definitions.ja: 引き継ぎは制御移転イベントであり、タスク、会話、経路、実行状態の責任を別のエージェント参加者または遠隔の受任者へ移します。

definitions.en: control-transfer event that moves responsibility for a task, conversation, route, or runtime state to another agent actor or remote delegate.
definitions.zh: 交接是控制转移事件，把任务、对话、路由或运行状态的责任移交给另一智能体参与者或远程受托方。
definitions.ja: 引き継ぎは制御移転イベントであり、タスク、会話、経路、実行状態の責任を別のエージェント参加者または遠隔の受任者へ移します。

why_needed.zh: 控制移交为canonical 事实 Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer（Handoff causes ResponsibilityTransfer）提供明确端点并保持与 ResponsibilityTransfer 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: handoff provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer (Handoff causes ResponsibilityTransfer) while preserving its reviewed boundary from ResponsibilityTransfer.
why_needed.ja: ハンドオフはcanonical 事実 Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer（Handoff causes ResponsibilityTransfer）の明確な端点を提供し、ResponsibilityTransfer との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的控制移交：交接是控制转移事件，把任务、对话、路由或运行状态的责任移交给另一智能体参与者或远程受托方。；该种差可由关系 Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes handoff records satisfying this reviewed differentia: control-transfer event that moves responsibility for a task, conversation, route, or runtime state to another agent actor or remote delegate. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たすハンドオフを含みます：引き継ぎは制御移転イベントであり、タスク、会話、経路、実行状態の責任を別のエージェント参加者または遠隔の受任者へ移します。 種差は関係 Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 责任转移只是关系 Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer 的另一端；相关联不表示它是控制移交。
excludes.en: ResponsibilityTransfer is only the other endpoint of Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer; relatedness does not make it a Handoff.
excludes.ja: ResponsibilityTransfer は Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer のもう一方の端点にすぎず、関連するだけで Handoff にはなりません。

descriptions.zh: 在可核验图谱片段中，Handoff 以自身 canonical ID 参与canonical 事实 Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer（Handoff causes ResponsibilityTransfer）；该记录不与边界对照项 ResponsibilityTransfer 混用。交接是控制转移事件，把任务、对话、路由或运行状态的责任移交给另一智能体参与者或远程受托方。
descriptions.en: In a verifiable graph fragment, Handoff participates in canonical fact Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer (Handoff causes ResponsibilityTransfer) under its own canonical ID; the record is not conflated with boundary contrast ResponsibilityTransfer. control-transfer event that moves responsibility for a task, conversation, route, or runtime state to another agent actor or remote delegate.
descriptions.ja: 検証可能なグラフ断片で、Handoff は自身の canonical ID によりcanonical 事実 Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer（Handoff causes ResponsibilityTransfer）へ参加します。境界対照 ResponsibilityTransfer と混同しません。引き継ぎは制御移転イベントであり、タスク、会話、経路、実行状態の責任を別のエージェント参加者または遠隔の受任者へ移します。

expected_result.zh: 查询必须解析到 Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer 的 Handoff 端点，并通过该节点的字段与种差校验。
expected_result.en: The query must resolve Handoff as an endpoint of Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer and validate the node's fields and differentia.
expected_result.ja: 照会は Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer の端点として Handoff を解決し、ノードの項目と種差を検証しなければなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 示例复用真实端点和关系 Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer，没有用名称相似性替代关系或类型断言。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The example reuses the actual endpoints and relation Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer; name similarity does not substitute for a relation or type assertion.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: この例は実在する端点と関係 Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer を再利用し、名称類似性で関係または型アサーションを代替しません。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed causes relation from Handoff to ResponsibilityTransfer. The ontology-specific boundary for Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > A2A docs heading and documented conceptual model

descriptions.zh: ResponsibilityTransfer 用作Handoff的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 ResponsibilityTransfer 的已审查定义是“责任转移记录委派或交接期间哪些责任更换所有者，包括任务保管、控制保管、答案归属和审计责任。”。不能因 relation Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer 而把它归入Handoff。
descriptions.en: ResponsibilityTransfer is the boundary contrast for Handoff. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but ResponsibilityTransfer's reviewed definition is “records which responsibility changes owner during delegation or handoff, including task custody, control custody, answer ownership, and audit accountability.”. relation Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer does not make it a Handoff.
descriptions.ja: ResponsibilityTransfer は Handoff の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、ResponsibilityTransfer の審査済み定義は「責任移転は、委任または引き継ぎの間にどの責任の所有者が変わるかを記録し、タスク管理、制御管理、回答帰属、監査責任を含みます。」です。relation Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer だけで Handoff にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: ResponsibilityTransfer 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 Handoff。
expected_result.en: ResponsibilityTransfer retains its own type; validation must not promote it to Handoff from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: ResponsibilityTransfer は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで Handoff へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

labels.ja: オーケストレーター役割

short_definitions.zh: 编排者描述分解、委派、路由和综合职责，是可由不同 Actor 承担的协调角色，而非固定 Actor 子类。
short_definitions.en: Orchestrator denotes decomposition, delegation, routing, and synthesis responsibilities and is therefore a CoordinationRole borne by actors, not a fixed actor subtype.
short_definitions.ja: Orchestrator は分解、委任、経路制御、統合の責務を表すため、固定アクター下位型でなくアクターが担う CoordinationRole である。

definitions.zh: 编排者描述分解、委派、路由和综合职责，是可由不同 Actor 承担的协调角色，而非固定 Actor 子类。
definitions.en: Orchestrator denotes decomposition, delegation, routing, and synthesis responsibilities and is therefore a CoordinationRole borne by actors, not a fixed actor subtype.
definitions.ja: Orchestrator は分解、委任、経路制御、統合の責務を表すため、固定アクター下位型でなくアクターが担う CoordinationRole である。

why_needed.zh: 编排者角色为canonical 事实 delegates_to_subagent（Orchestrator delegates_to_subagent SubagentRole）提供明确端点并保持与 SubagentRole 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: orchestrator role provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact delegates_to_subagent (Orchestrator delegates_to_subagent SubagentRole) while preserving its reviewed boundary from SubagentRole.
why_needed.ja: オーケストレーター役割はcanonical 事実 delegates_to_subagent（Orchestrator delegates_to_subagent SubagentRole）の明確な端点を提供し、SubagentRole との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的编排者角色：编排者描述分解、委派、路由和综合职责，是可由不同 Actor 承担的协调角色，而非固定 Actor 子类。；该种差可由关系 delegates_to_subagent 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes orchestrator role records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Orchestrator denotes decomposition, delegation, routing, and synthesis responsibilities and is therefore a CoordinationRole borne by actors, not a fixed actor subtype. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in delegates_to_subagent.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たすオーケストレーター役割を含みます：Orchestrator は分解、委任、経路制御、統合の責務を表すため、固定アクター下位型でなくアクターが担う CoordinationRole である。 種差は関係 delegates_to_subagent の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 子智能体角色虽与本概念同属 CoordinationRole，但其定义为“子智能体角色是以受限任务、权限、上下文和向上汇报为区分特征的一种协调角色。”，不得替代编排者角色。
excludes.en: SubagentRole shares parent CoordinationRole, but its reviewed definition is “SubagentRole is a CoordinationRole distinguished by bounded work, authority, context, and upward reporting.”; it must not be substituted for Orchestrator.
excludes.ja: SubagentRole は同じ上位 CoordinationRole を持ちますが、審査済み定義は「SubagentRole は限定された作業、権限、文脈、上位への報告で区別される CoordinationRole である。」であり、Orchestrator の代用にはできません。

expected_result.zh: 查询必须解析到 delegates_to_subagent 的 Orchestrator 端点，并通过该节点的字段与种差校验。
expected_result.en: The query must resolve Orchestrator as an endpoint of delegates_to_subagent and validate the node's fields and differentia.
expected_result.ja: 照会は delegates_to_subagent の端点として Orchestrator を解決し、ノードの項目と種差を検証しなければなりません。

labels.ja: オーケストレーター役割の境界例

descriptions.zh: SubagentRole 用作Orchestrator的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 SubagentRole 的已审查定义是“子智能体角色是以受限任务、权限、上下文和向上汇报为区分特征的一种协调角色。”。不能因 shared parent CoordinationRole 而把它归入Orchestrator。
descriptions.en: SubagentRole is the boundary contrast for Orchestrator. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but SubagentRole's reviewed definition is “SubagentRole is a CoordinationRole distinguished by bounded work, authority, context, and upward reporting.”. shared parent CoordinationRole does not make it a Orchestrator.
descriptions.ja: SubagentRole は Orchestrator の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、SubagentRole の審査済み定義は「SubagentRole は限定された作業、権限、文脈、上位への報告で区別される CoordinationRole である。」です。shared parent CoordinationRole だけで Orchestrator にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: SubagentRole 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 Orchestrator。
expected_result.en: SubagentRole retains its own type; validation must not promote it to Orchestrator from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: SubagentRole は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで Orchestrator へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 delegates_to_subagent 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of delegates_to_subagent; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、delegates_to_subagent の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed delegates_to_subagent relation from Orchestrator to SubagentRole. The ontology-specific boundary for delegates_to_subagent is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed distinction of Orchestrator: Orchestrator denotes decomposition, delegation, routing, and synthesis responsibilities and is therefore a CoordinationRole borne by actors, not a fixed actor subtype. The ontology-specific boundary for Orchestrator is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation > Agents, tasks, crews, flows, and processes

source_claims.supports: Provides evidence for the reviewed distinction of Orchestrator: Orchestrator denotes decomposition, delegation, routing, and synthesis responsibilities and is therefore a CoordinationRole borne by actors, not a fixed actor subtype. The ontology-specific boundary for Orchestrator is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Overview > Durable execution, human-in-the-loop, memory, and subgraphs

decision_note.zh: 编排者描述分解、委派、路由和综合职责，是可由不同 Actor 承担的协调角色，而非固定 Actor 子类。
decision_note.en: Orchestrator denotes decomposition, delegation, routing, and synthesis responsibilities and is therefore a CoordinationRole borne by actors, not a fixed actor subtype.
decision_note.ja: Orchestrator は分解、委任、経路制御、統合の責務を表すため、固定アクター下位型でなくアクターが担う CoordinationRole である。

change_note.zh: 编排者描述分解、委派、路由和综合职责，是可由不同 Actor 承担的协调角色，而非固定 Actor 子类。
change_note.en: Orchestrator denotes decomposition, delegation, routing, and synthesis responsibilities and is therefore a CoordinationRole borne by actors, not a fixed actor subtype.
change_note.ja: Orchestrator は分解、委任、経路制御、統合の責務を表すため、固定アクター下位型でなくアクターが担う CoordinationRole である。

short_definitions.zh: 责任转移记录委派或交接期间哪些责任更换所有者，包括任务保管、控制保管、答案归属和审计责任。
short_definitions.en: records which responsibility changes owner during delegation or handoff, including task custody, control custody, answer ownership, and audit accountability.
short_definitions.ja: 責任移転は、委任または引き継ぎの間にどの責任の所有者が変わるかを記録し、タスク管理、制御管理、回答帰属、監査責任を含みます。

definitions.en: records which responsibility changes owner during delegation or handoff, including task custody, control custody, answer ownership, and audit accountability.
definitions.zh: 责任转移记录委派或交接期间哪些责任更换所有者，包括任务保管、控制保管、答案归属和审计责任。
definitions.ja: 責任移転は、委任または引き継ぎの間にどの責任の所有者が変わるかを記録し、タスク管理、制御管理、回答帰属、監査責任を含みます。

why_needed.zh: 责任转移为canonical 事实 Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer（Handoff causes ResponsibilityTransfer）提供明确端点并保持与 Handoff 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: responsibility transfer provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer (Handoff causes ResponsibilityTransfer) while preserving its reviewed boundary from Handoff.
why_needed.ja: 責任移転はcanonical 事実 Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer（Handoff causes ResponsibilityTransfer）の明確な端点を提供し、Handoff との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的责任转移：责任转移记录委派或交接期间哪些责任更换所有者，包括任务保管、控制保管、答案归属和审计责任。；该种差可由关系 Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes responsibility transfer records satisfying this reviewed differentia: records which responsibility changes owner during delegation or handoff, including task custody, control custody, answer ownership, and audit accountability. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす責任移転を含みます：責任移転は、委任または引き継ぎの間にどの責任の所有者が変わるかを記録し、タスク管理、制御管理、回答帰属、監査責任を含みます。 種差は関係 Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 控制移交只是关系 Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer 的另一端；相关联不表示它是责任转移。
excludes.en: Handoff is only the other endpoint of Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer; relatedness does not make it a ResponsibilityTransfer.
excludes.ja: Handoff は Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer のもう一方の端点にすぎず、関連するだけで ResponsibilityTransfer にはなりません。

descriptions.zh: 在可核验图谱片段中，ResponsibilityTransfer 以自身 canonical ID 参与canonical 事实 Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer（Handoff causes ResponsibilityTransfer）；该记录不与边界对照项 Handoff 混用。责任转移记录委派或交接期间哪些责任更换所有者，包括任务保管、控制保管、答案归属和审计责任。
descriptions.en: In a verifiable graph fragment, ResponsibilityTransfer participates in canonical fact Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer (Handoff causes ResponsibilityTransfer) under its own canonical ID; the record is not conflated with boundary contrast Handoff. records which responsibility changes owner during delegation or handoff, including task custody, control custody, answer ownership, and audit accountability.
descriptions.ja: 検証可能なグラフ断片で、ResponsibilityTransfer は自身の canonical ID によりcanonical 事実 Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer（Handoff causes ResponsibilityTransfer）へ参加します。境界対照 Handoff と混同しません。責任移転は、委任または引き継ぎの間にどの責任の所有者が変わるかを記録し、タスク管理、制御管理、回答帰属、監査責任を含みます。

expected_result.zh: 查询必须解析到 Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer 的 ResponsibilityTransfer 端点，并通过该节点的字段与种差校验。
expected_result.en: The query must resolve ResponsibilityTransfer as an endpoint of Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer and validate the node's fields and differentia.
expected_result.ja: 照会は Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer の端点として ResponsibilityTransfer を解決し、ノードの項目と種差を検証しなければなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 示例复用真实端点和关系 Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer，没有用名称相似性替代关系或类型断言。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The example reuses the actual endpoints and relation Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer; name similarity does not substitute for a relation or type assertion.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: この例は実在する端点と関係 Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer を再利用し、名称類似性で関係または型アサーションを代替しません。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed causes relation from Handoff to ResponsibilityTransfer. The ontology-specific boundary for Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > A2A docs heading and documented conceptual model

descriptions.zh: Handoff 用作ResponsibilityTransfer的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 Handoff 的已审查定义是“交接是控制转移事件，把任务、对话、路由或运行状态的责任移交给另一智能体参与者或远程受托方。”。不能因 relation Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer 而把它归入ResponsibilityTransfer。
descriptions.en: Handoff is the boundary contrast for ResponsibilityTransfer. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but Handoff's reviewed definition is “control-transfer event that moves responsibility for a task, conversation, route, or runtime state to another agent actor or remote delegate.”. relation Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer does not make it a ResponsibilityTransfer.
descriptions.ja: Handoff は ResponsibilityTransfer の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、Handoff の審査済み定義は「引き継ぎは制御移転イベントであり、タスク、会話、経路、実行状態の責任を別のエージェント参加者または遠隔の受任者へ移します。」です。relation Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer だけで ResponsibilityTransfer にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: Handoff 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 ResponsibilityTransfer。
expected_result.en: Handoff retains its own type; validation must not promote it to ResponsibilityTransfer from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: Handoff は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで ResponsibilityTransfer へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、Handoff-causes-ResponsibilityTransfer の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

decision_note.en: ResponsibilityTransfer records before/after responsibility, custody, and accountability and is information caused by a handoff event.

short_definitions.zh: 子智能体上下文是子智能体可见的受限上下文包，包含允许的消息、来源、记忆、任务状态、工具结果和排除项。
short_definitions.en: scoped context package visible to a subagent, including allowed messages, sources, memory, task state, tool results, and exclusions.
short_definitions.ja: サブエージェント文脈は、サブエージェントに見える範囲づけられた文脈パッケージで、許可されたメッセージ、出典、記憶、タスク状態、道具結果、除外項目を含みます。

definitions.en: scoped context package visible to a subagent, including allowed messages, sources, memory, task state, tool results, and exclusions.

The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in DelegationContract-bounds-SubagentContext.

descriptions.zh: DelegationContract 用作SubagentContext的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 DelegationContract 的已审查定义是“委派契约规定委派工作、预期结果、授权范围、可见上下文、预算、完成准则以及委派方和受托方的归属边界。”。不能因 relation DelegationContract-bounds-SubagentContext 而把它归入SubagentContext。
descriptions.en: DelegationContract is the boundary contrast for SubagentContext. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but DelegationContract's reviewed definition is “specifies delegated work, expected result, authority scope, visible context, budget, completion criteria, and ownership boundaries between delegator and delegatee.”. relation DelegationContract-bounds-SubagentContext does not make it a SubagentContext.
descriptions.ja: DelegationContract は SubagentContext の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、DelegationContract の審査済み定義は「委任契約は、委任作業、期待される結果、権限範囲、可視文脈、予算、完了基準、委任者と受任者の帰属境界を定めます。」です。relation DelegationContract-bounds-SubagentContext だけで SubagentContext にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: DelegationContract 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 SubagentContext。
expected_result.en: DelegationContract retains its own type; validation must not promote it to SubagentContext from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: DelegationContract は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで SubagentContext へ昇格してはなりません。

why_needed.ja: サブエージェント役割はcanonical 事実 delegates_to_subagent（Orchestrator delegates_to_subagent SubagentRole）の明確な端点を提供し、Orchestrator との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的子智能体角色：子智能体角色是以受限任务、权限、上下文和向上汇报为区分特征的一种协调角色。；该种差可由关系 delegates_to_subagent 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes subagent role records satisfying this reviewed differentia: SubagentRole is a CoordinationRole distinguished by bounded work, authority, context, and upward reporting. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in delegates_to_subagent.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たすサブエージェント役割を含みます：SubagentRole は限定された作業、権限、文脈、上位への報告で区別される CoordinationRole である。 種差は関係 delegates_to_subagent の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 编排者角色虽与本概念同属 CoordinationRole，但其定义为“编排者描述分解、委派、路由和综合职责，是可由不同 Actor 承担的协调角色，而非固定 Actor 子类。”，不得替代子智能体角色。
excludes.en: Orchestrator shares parent CoordinationRole, but its reviewed definition is “Orchestrator denotes decomposition, delegation, routing, and synthesis responsibilities and is therefore a CoordinationRole borne by actors, not a fixed actor subtype.”; it must not be substituted for SubagentRole.
excludes.ja: Orchestrator は同じ上位 CoordinationRole を持ちますが、審査済み定義は「Orchestrator は分解、委任、経路制御、統合の責務を表すため、固定アクター下位型でなくアクターが担う CoordinationRole である。」であり、SubagentRole の代用にはできません。

labels.ja: サブエージェント役割の正例

descriptions.zh: 在可核验图谱片段中，SubagentRole 以自身 canonical ID 参与canonical 事实 delegates_to_subagent（Orchestrator delegates_to_subagent SubagentRole）；该记录不与边界对照项 Orchestrator 混用。子智能体角色是以受限任务、权限、上下文和向上汇报为区分特征的一种协调角色。
descriptions.en: In a verifiable graph fragment, SubagentRole participates in canonical fact delegates_to_subagent (Orchestrator delegates_to_subagent SubagentRole) under its own canonical ID; the record is not conflated with boundary contrast Orchestrator. SubagentRole is a CoordinationRole distinguished by bounded work, authority, context, and upward reporting.
descriptions.ja: 検証可能なグラフ断片で、SubagentRole は自身の canonical ID によりcanonical 事実 delegates_to_subagent（Orchestrator delegates_to_subagent SubagentRole）へ参加します。境界対照 Orchestrator と混同しません。SubagentRole は限定された作業、権限、文脈、上位への報告で区別される CoordinationRole である。

expected_result.zh: 查询必须解析到 delegates_to_subagent 的 SubagentRole 端点，并通过该节点的字段与种差校验。
expected_result.en: The query must resolve SubagentRole as an endpoint of delegates_to_subagent and validate the node's fields and differentia.
expected_result.ja: 照会は delegates_to_subagent の端点として SubagentRole を解決し、ノードの項目と種差を検証しなければなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 示例复用真实端点和关系 delegates_to_subagent，没有用名称相似性替代关系或类型断言。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The example reuses the actual endpoints and relation delegates_to_subagent; name similarity does not substitute for a relation or type assertion.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: この例は実在する端点と関係 delegates_to_subagent を再利用し、名称類似性で関係または型アサーションを代替しません。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed delegates_to_subagent relation from Orchestrator to SubagentRole. The ontology-specific boundary for delegates_to_subagent is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

labels.ja: サブエージェント役割の境界例

descriptions.zh: Orchestrator 用作SubagentRole的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 Orchestrator 的已审查定义是“编排者描述分解、委派、路由和综合职责，是可由不同 Actor 承担的协调角色，而非固定 Actor 子类。”。不能因 shared parent CoordinationRole 而把它归入SubagentRole。
descriptions.en: Orchestrator is the boundary contrast for SubagentRole. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but Orchestrator's reviewed definition is “Orchestrator denotes decomposition, delegation, routing, and synthesis responsibilities and is therefore a CoordinationRole borne by actors, not a fixed actor subtype.”. shared parent CoordinationRole does not make it a SubagentRole.
descriptions.ja: Orchestrator は SubagentRole の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、Orchestrator の審査済み定義は「Orchestrator は分解、委任、経路制御、統合の責務を表すため、固定アクター下位型でなくアクターが担う CoordinationRole である。」です。shared parent CoordinationRole だけで SubagentRole にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: Orchestrator 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 SubagentRole。
expected_result.en: Orchestrator retains its own type; validation must not promote it to SubagentRole from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: Orchestrator は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで SubagentRole へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 delegates_to_subagent 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of delegates_to_subagent; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、delegates_to_subagent の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed delegates_to_subagent relation from Orchestrator to SubagentRole. The ontology-specific boundary for delegates_to_subagent is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Deep Agents JS docs heading and documented conceptual model

short_definitions.zh: 任务分发是把工作项分配给选定执行者并保留范围证据的一种委派过程。
short_definitions.en: TaskDistribution is a DelegationProcess distinguished by assigning work items to selected performers with scope evidence.
short_definitions.ja: TaskDistribution は範囲証拠を保持して作業項目を選択された実行者へ割り当てる DelegationProcess である。

definitions.zh: 任务分发是把工作项分配给选定执行者并保留范围证据的一种委派过程。

why_needed.zh: 任务分发为canonical 事实 assigns_work_item_to（TaskDistribution assigns_work_item_to WorkerAgent）提供明确端点并保持与 AgentAsToolInvocation 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: task distribution provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact assigns_work_item_to (TaskDistribution assigns_work_item_to WorkerAgent) while preserving its reviewed boundary from AgentAsToolInvocation.

short_definitions.zh: 工作者表示接收范围化工作并返回证据的职责，可由 Agent、模型服务或工具服务承担，因此改为协调角色。
short_definitions.en: Worker denotes responsibility for receiving scoped work and returning evidence and can be borne by an agent, model service, or tool service, so it is retyped as a CoordinationRole.
short_definitions.ja: Worker は範囲付き作業を受け証拠を返す責務で、エージェント、モデルサービス、ツールサービスが担えるため CoordinationRole とする。

decision_note.zh: 工作者表示接收范围化工作并返回证据的职责，可由 Agent、模型服务或工具服务承担，因此改为协调角色。
decision_note.en: Worker denotes responsibility for receiving scoped work and returning evidence and can be borne by an agent, model service, or tool service, so it is retyped as a CoordinationRole.
decision_note.ja: Worker は範囲付き作業を受け証拠を返す責務で、エージェント、モデルサービス、ツールサービスが担えるため CoordinationRole とする。

change_note.zh: 工作者表示接收范围化工作并返回证据的职责，可由 Agent、模型服务或工具服务承担，因此改为协调角色。
change_note.en: Worker denotes responsibility for receiving scoped work and returning evidence and can be borne by an agent, model service, or tool service, so it is retyped as a CoordinationRole.
change_note.ja: Worker は範囲付き作業を受け証拠を返す責務で、エージェント、モデルサービス、ツールサービスが担えるため CoordinationRole とする。

short_definitions.zh: 工作者可用性记录工作者或子智能体是否能接收工作，包括负载、生命周期状态、能力就绪情况和备选状态。
short_definitions.en: records whether a worker or subagent can accept work, including load, lifecycle state, capability readiness, and fallback status.
short_definitions.ja: 作業者可用性は、作業者またはサブエージェントが作業を受けられるかを記録し、負荷、ライフサイクル状態、能力準備、代替状態を含みます。

definitions.en: records whether a worker or subagent can accept work, including load, lifecycle state, capability readiness, and fallback status.
definitions.zh: 工作者可用性记录工作者或子智能体是否能接收工作，包括负载、生命周期状态、能力就绪情况和备选状态。
definitions.ja: 作業者可用性は、作業者またはサブエージェントが作業を受けられるかを記録し、負荷、ライフサイクル状態、能力準備、代替状態を含みます。

why_needed.zh: 工作者可用性为canonical 事实 WorkerSelection-evaluates-WorkerAvailability（WorkerSelection evaluates WorkerAvailability）提供明确端点并保持与 WorkerSelection 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: worker availability provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact WorkerSelection-evaluates-WorkerAvailability (WorkerSelection evaluates WorkerAvailability) while preserving its reviewed boundary from WorkerSelection.
why_needed.ja: 作業者可用性はcanonical 事実 WorkerSelection-evaluates-WorkerAvailability（WorkerSelection evaluates WorkerAvailability）の明確な端点を提供し、WorkerSelection との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的工作者可用性：工作者可用性记录工作者或子智能体是否能接收工作，包括负载、生命周期状态、能力就绪情况和备选状态。；该种差可由关系 WorkerSelection-evaluates-WorkerAvailability 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes worker availability records satisfying this reviewed differentia: records whether a worker or subagent can accept work, including load, lifecycle state, capability readiness, and fallback status. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in WorkerSelection-evaluates-WorkerAvailability.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす作業者可用性を含みます：作業者可用性は、作業者またはサブエージェントが作業を受けられるかを記録し、負荷、ライフサイクル状態、能力準備、代替状態を含みます。 種差は関係 WorkerSelection-evaluates-WorkerAvailability の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 工作者选择只是关系 WorkerSelection-evaluates-WorkerAvailability 的另一端；相关联不表示它是工作者可用性。
excludes.en: WorkerSelection is only the other endpoint of WorkerSelection-evaluates-WorkerAvailability; relatedness does not make it a WorkerAvailability.
excludes.ja: WorkerSelection は WorkerSelection-evaluates-WorkerAvailability のもう一方の端点にすぎず、関連するだけで WorkerAvailability にはなりません。

descriptions.zh: 在可核验图谱片段中，WorkerAvailability 以自身 canonical ID 参与canonical 事实 WorkerSelection-evaluates-WorkerAvailability（WorkerSelection evaluates WorkerAvailability）；该记录不与边界对照项 WorkerSelection 混用。工作者可用性记录工作者或子智能体是否能接收工作，包括负载、生命周期状态、能力就绪情况和备选状态。
descriptions.en: In a verifiable graph fragment, WorkerAvailability participates in canonical fact WorkerSelection-evaluates-WorkerAvailability (WorkerSelection evaluates WorkerAvailability) under its own canonical ID; the record is not conflated with boundary contrast WorkerSelection. records whether a worker or subagent can accept work, including load, lifecycle state, capability readiness, and fallback status.
descriptions.ja: 検証可能なグラフ断片で、WorkerAvailability は自身の canonical ID によりcanonical 事実 WorkerSelection-evaluates-WorkerAvailability（WorkerSelection evaluates WorkerAvailability）へ参加します。境界対照 WorkerSelection と混同しません。作業者可用性は、作業者またはサブエージェントが作業を受けられるかを記録し、負荷、ライフサイクル状態、能力準備、代替状態を含みます。

expected_result.zh: 查询必须解析到 WorkerSelection-evaluates-WorkerAvailability 的 WorkerAvailability 端点，并通过该节点的字段与种差校验。
expected_result.en: The query must resolve WorkerAvailability as an endpoint of WorkerSelection-evaluates-WorkerAvailability and validate the node's fields and differentia.
expected_result.ja: 照会は WorkerSelection-evaluates-WorkerAvailability の端点として WorkerAvailability を解決し、ノードの項目と種差を検証しなければなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 示例复用真实端点和关系 WorkerSelection-evaluates-WorkerAvailability，没有用名称相似性替代关系或类型断言。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The example reuses the actual endpoints and relation WorkerSelection-evaluates-WorkerAvailability; name similarity does not substitute for a relation or type assertion.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: この例は実在する端点と関係 WorkerSelection-evaluates-WorkerAvailability を再利用し、名称類似性で関係または型アサーションを代替しません。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed evaluates relation from WorkerSelection to WorkerAvailability. The ontology-specific boundary for WorkerSelection-evaluates-WorkerAvailability is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation > Agents, tasks, crews, flows, and processes

labels.ja: 作業者可用性の境界例

descriptions.zh: WorkerSelection 用作WorkerAvailability的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 WorkerSelection 的已审查定义是“工作者选择是决策事件，根据能力、可用性、成本、安全和上下文匹配证据，从候选池中选择工作者、子智能体、模型、工具或路由。”。不能因 relation WorkerSelection-evaluates-WorkerAvailability 而把它归入WorkerAvailability。
descriptions.en: WorkerSelection is the boundary contrast for WorkerAvailability. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but WorkerSelection's reviewed definition is “decision event that chooses a worker, subagent, model, tool, or route from a candidate pool using capability, availability, cost, safety, and context-fit evidence.”. relation WorkerSelection-evaluates-WorkerAvailability does not make it a WorkerAvailability.
descriptions.ja: WorkerSelection は WorkerAvailability の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、WorkerSelection の審査済み定義は「作業者選択は、能力、可用性、費用、安全性、文脈適合の証拠に基づき、候補集合から作業者、サブエージェント、モデル、道具、経路を選ぶ決定イベントです。」です。relation WorkerSelection-evaluates-WorkerAvailability だけで WorkerAvailability にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: WorkerSelection 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 WorkerAvailability。
expected_result.en: WorkerSelection retains its own type; validation must not promote it to WorkerAvailability from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: WorkerSelection は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで WorkerAvailability へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 WorkerSelection-evaluates-WorkerAvailability 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of WorkerSelection-evaluates-WorkerAvailability; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、WorkerSelection-evaluates-WorkerAvailability の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

descriptions.zh: WorkerSelection 用作WorkerPool的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 WorkerSelection 的已审查定义是“工作者选择是决策事件，根据能力、可用性、成本、安全和上下文匹配证据，从候选池中选择工作者、子智能体、模型、工具或路由。”。不能因 relation WorkerSelection-selects_from-WorkerPool 而把它归入WorkerPool。

Both may occur in one graph fragment, but WorkerSelection's reviewed definition is “decision event that chooses a worker, subagent, model, tool, or route from a candidate pool using capability, availability, cost, safety, and context-fit evidence.”. relation WorkerSelection-selects_from-WorkerPool does not make it a WorkerPool.

decision_note.zh: 三个概念的任一实例均是协调职责而非特定软件实体，且可按管理/受委派/执行职责区分。
decision_note.en: Every instance of the three concepts is a coordination responsibility rather than a particular software entity, distinguished by managing, delegated, and performing duties.
decision_note.ja: 三概念の全インスタンスは特定ソフトウェア実体でなく調整責務で、管理、受委任、実行の職務で区別できる。

change_note.zh: 三个概念的任一实例均是协调职责而非特定软件实体，且可按管理/受委派/执行职责区分。
change_note.en: Every instance of the three concepts is a coordination responsibility rather than a particular software entity, distinguished by managing, delegated, and performing duties.
change_note.ja: 三概念の全インスタンスは特定ソフトウェア実体でなく調整責務で、管理、受委任、実行の職務で区別できる。

short_definitions.zh: 把有边界工作交由另一角色完成并保留责任链的活动。
short_definitions.en: An activity assigning bounded work to another role while preserving accountability lineage.
short_definitions.ja: 境界付き作業を別の役割へ委ね責任系譜を保持する活動。

definitions.zh: 委派过程是委派者依据合同把有范围的工作、权限、上下文与预算交给代理角色执行，并接收可追踪结果而保持或转移明确归属的协调活动。
definitions.en: A DelegationProcess is a coordination activity in which a delegator assigns scoped work, authority, context, and budget under a contract to a delegate role and receives a traceable result with explicit retained or transferred ownership.
definitions.ja: DelegationProcess は委任者が契約に基づき範囲付き作業、権限、文脈、予算を代理役割へ割り当て、明示された保持・移転帰属と共に追跡可能な結果を受け取る調整活動である。

why_needed.zh: 委派过程为canonical 事实 DelegationProcess-governed_by-DelegationContract（DelegationProcess governed_by DelegationContract）提供明确端点并保持与 DelegationContract 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: delegation process provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact DelegationProcess-governed_by-DelegationContract (DelegationProcess governed_by DelegationContract) while preserving its reviewed boundary from DelegationContract.
why_needed.ja: 委任プロセスはcanonical 事実 DelegationProcess-governed_by-DelegationContract（DelegationProcess governed_by DelegationContract）の明確な端点を提供し、DelegationContract との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的委派过程：委派过程是委派者依据合同把有范围的工作、权限、上下文与预算交给代理角色执行，并接收可追踪结果而保持或转移明确归属的协调活动。；该种差可由关系 DelegationProcess-governed_by-DelegationContract 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes delegation process records satisfying this reviewed differentia: A DelegationProcess is a coordination activity in which a delegator assigns scoped work, authority, context, and budget under a contract to a delegate role and receives a traceable result with explicit retained or transferred ownership. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in DelegationProcess-governed_by-DelegationContract.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす委任プロセスを含みます：DelegationProcess は委任者が契約に基づき範囲付き作業、権限、文脈、予算を代理役割へ割り当て、明示された保持・移転帰属と共に追跡可能な結果を受け取る調整活動である。 種差は関係 DelegationProcess-governed_by-DelegationContract の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 委派契约只是关系 DelegationProcess-governed_by-DelegationContract 的另一端；相关联不表示它是委派过程。
excludes.en: DelegationContract is only the other endpoint of DelegationProcess-governed_by-DelegationContract; relatedness does not make it a DelegationProcess.
excludes.ja: DelegationContract は DelegationProcess-governed_by-DelegationContract のもう一方の端点にすぎず、関連するだけで DelegationProcess にはなりません。

descriptions.zh: 在可核验图谱片段中，DelegationProcess 以自身 canonical ID 参与canonical 事实 DelegationProcess-governed_by-DelegationContract（DelegationProcess governed_by DelegationContract）；该记录不与边界对照项 DelegationContract 混用。委派过程是委派者依据合同把有范围的工作、权限、上下文与预算交给代理角色执行，并接收可追踪结果而保持或转移明确归属的协调活动。
descriptions.en: In a verifiable graph fragment, DelegationProcess participates in canonical fact DelegationProcess-governed_by-DelegationContract (DelegationProcess governed_by DelegationContract) under its own canonical ID; the record is not conflated with boundary contrast DelegationContract. A DelegationProcess is a coordination activity in which a delegator assigns scoped work, authority, context, and budget under a contract to a delegate role and receives a traceable result with explicit retained or transferred ownership.
descriptions.ja: 検証可能なグラフ断片で、DelegationProcess は自身の canonical ID によりcanonical 事実 DelegationProcess-governed_by-DelegationContract（DelegationProcess governed_by DelegationContract）へ参加します。境界対照 DelegationContract と混同しません。DelegationProcess は委任者が契約に基づき範囲付き作業、権限、文脈、予算を代理役割へ割り当て、明示された保持・移転帰属と共に追跡可能な結果を受け取る調整活動である。

expected_result.zh: 查询必须解析到 DelegationProcess-governed_by-DelegationContract 的 DelegationProcess 端点，并通过该节点的字段与种差校验。
expected_result.en: The query must resolve DelegationProcess as an endpoint of DelegationProcess-governed_by-DelegationContract and validate the node's fields and differentia.
expected_result.ja: 照会は DelegationProcess-governed_by-DelegationContract の端点として DelegationProcess を解決し、ノードの項目と種差を検証しなければなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 示例复用真实端点和关系 DelegationProcess-governed_by-DelegationContract，没有用名称相似性替代关系或类型断言。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The example reuses the actual endpoints and relation DelegationProcess-governed_by-DelegationContract; name similarity does not substitute for a relation or type assertion.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: この例は実在する端点と関係 DelegationProcess-governed_by-DelegationContract を再利用し、名称類似性で関係または型アサーションを代替しません。

source_claims.supports: Supports the reviewed governed_by relation from DelegationProcess to DelegationContract. The ontology-specific boundary for DelegationProcess-governed_by-DelegationContract is an accepted design inference over this registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > A2A docs heading and documented conceptual model

labels.ja: 委任プロセスの境界例

descriptions.zh: DelegationContract 用作DelegationProcess的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 DelegationContract 的已审查定义是“委派契约规定委派工作、预期结果、授权范围、可见上下文、预算、完成准则以及委派方和受托方的归属边界。”。不能因 relation DelegationProcess-governed_by-DelegationContract 而把它归入DelegationProcess。
descriptions.en: DelegationContract is the boundary contrast for DelegationProcess. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but DelegationContract's reviewed definition is “specifies delegated work, expected result, authority scope, visible context, budget, completion criteria, and ownership boundaries between delegator and delegatee.”. relation DelegationProcess-governed_by-DelegationContract does not make it a DelegationProcess.
descriptions.ja: DelegationContract は DelegationProcess の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、DelegationContract の審査済み定義は「委任契約は、委任作業、期待される結果、権限範囲、可視文脈、予算、完了基準、委任者と受任者の帰属境界を定めます。」です。relation DelegationProcess-governed_by-DelegationContract だけで DelegationProcess にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: DelegationContract 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 DelegationProcess。
expected_result.en: DelegationContract retains its own type; validation must not promote it to DelegationProcess from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: DelegationContract は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで DelegationProcess へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 DelegationProcess-governed_by-DelegationContract 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of DelegationProcess-governed_by-DelegationContract; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、DelegationProcess-governed_by-DelegationContract の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

decision_note.zh: 工具式委派与任务分发都满足“有界工作交由另一角色并保留责任链”，区分在控制保留和分配形态。
decision_note.en: Tool-like delegation and task distribution both assign bounded work to another role with accountability lineage and differ in control retention and assignment form.
decision_note.ja: 道具型委任とタスク配分は共に境界付き作業を別役割へ委ね責任系譜を保持し、制御保持と割当形態で区別される。

change_note.zh: 工具式委派与任务分发都满足“有界工作交由另一角色并保留责任链”，区分在控制保留和分配形态。

short_definitions.zh: 记录编排责任、控制或答案当前归属主体的信息。
short_definitions.en: Information recording current ownership of orchestration responsibility, control, or answer.
short_definitions.ja: 編成責任、制御、回答の現在の帰属主体を記録する情報。

definitions.zh: 协调归属记录是在委派、移交或综合的某一时点，说明哪一主体拥有答案责任、下一步控制权或委派责任，并记录范围、有效期和转移来源的信息记录。
definitions.en: A CoordinationOwnershipRecord identifies, at a time during delegation, handoff, or synthesis, which actor owns answer accountability, next-step control, or delegation responsibility, with scope, validity, and transfer provenance.
definitions.ja: CoordinationOwnershipRecord は委任、移交、統合のある時点で、回答責任、次の制御権、委任責任をどの主体が持つかを範囲、有効期間、移転来歴と共に記録する。

why_needed.zh: 协调归属记录为canonical 事实 AnswerOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord（AnswerOwnership is_a CoordinationOwnershipRecord）提供明确端点并保持与 AnswerOwnership 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: coordination ownership record provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact AnswerOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord (AnswerOwnership is_a CoordinationOwnershipRecord) while preserving its reviewed boundary from AnswerOwnership.
why_needed.ja: 調整帰属記録はcanonical 事実 AnswerOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord（AnswerOwnership is_a CoordinationOwnershipRecord）の明確な端点を提供し、AnswerOwnership との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的协调归属记录：协调归属记录是在委派、移交或综合的某一时点，说明哪一主体拥有答案责任、下一步控制权或委派责任，并记录范围、有效期和转移来源的信息记录。；该种差可由关系 AnswerOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes coordination ownership record records satisfying this reviewed differentia: A CoordinationOwnershipRecord identifies, at a time during delegation, handoff, or synthesis, which actor owns answer accountability, next-step control, or delegation responsibility, with scope, validity, and transfer provenance. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in AnswerOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす調整帰属記録を含みます：CoordinationOwnershipRecord は委任、移交、統合のある時点で、回答責任、次の制御権、委任責任をどの主体が持つかを範囲、有効期間、移転来歴と共に記録する。 種差は関係 AnswerOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 答案归属只是关系 AnswerOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord 的另一端；相关联不表示它是协调归属记录。
excludes.en: AnswerOwnership is only the other endpoint of AnswerOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord; relatedness does not make it a CoordinationOwnershipRecord.
excludes.ja: AnswerOwnership は AnswerOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord のもう一方の端点にすぎず、関連するだけで CoordinationOwnershipRecord にはなりません。

labels.en: Positive example of coordination ownership record

descriptions.zh: 在可核验图谱片段中，CoordinationOwnershipRecord 以自身 canonical ID 参与canonical 事实 AnswerOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord（AnswerOwnership is_a CoordinationOwnershipRecord）；该记录不与边界对照项 AnswerOwnership 混用。协调归属记录是在委派、移交或综合的某一时点，说明哪一主体拥有答案责任、下一步控制权或委派责任，并记录范围、有效期和转移来源的信息记录。
descriptions.en: In a verifiable graph fragment, CoordinationOwnershipRecord participates in canonical fact AnswerOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord (AnswerOwnership is_a CoordinationOwnershipRecord) under its own canonical ID; the record is not conflated with boundary contrast AnswerOwnership. A CoordinationOwnershipRecord identifies, at a time during delegation, handoff, or synthesis, which actor owns answer accountability, next-step control, or delegation responsibility, with scope, validity, and transfer provenance.
descriptions.ja: 検証可能なグラフ断片で、CoordinationOwnershipRecord は自身の canonical ID によりcanonical 事実 AnswerOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord（AnswerOwnership is_a CoordinationOwnershipRecord）へ参加します。境界対照 AnswerOwnership と混同しません。CoordinationOwnershipRecord は委任、移交、統合のある時点で、回答責任、次の制御権、委任責任をどの主体が持つかを範囲、有効期間、移転来歴と共に記録する。

expected_result.zh: 查询必须解析到 AnswerOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord 的 CoordinationOwnershipRecord 端点，并通过该节点的字段与种差校验。
expected_result.en: The query must resolve CoordinationOwnershipRecord as an endpoint of AnswerOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord and validate the node's fields and differentia.
expected_result.ja: 照会は AnswerOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord の端点として CoordinationOwnershipRecord を解決し、ノードの項目と種差を検証しなければなりません。

descriptions.en: AnswerOwnership is the boundary contrast for CoordinationOwnershipRecord. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but AnswerOwnership's reviewed definition is “records which coordinating actor is accountable for the final response or artifact after delegation, handoff, review, or synthesis.”. relation AnswerOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord does not make it a CoordinationOwnershipRecord.

definitions.zh: 智能体作为工具调用 是一种 委派过程。区分特征：智能体作为工具调用是管理者保留控制权和答案归属的一种有界委派过程。
definitions.en: agent as tool invocation is a kind of delegation process. Reviewed differentia: Agent-as-tool invocation is a DelegationProcess distinguished by the manager retaining control and answer ownership.
definitions.ja: エージェント道具呼び出し は 委任プロセス の一種です。審査済みの種差：AgentAsToolInvocation は管理者が制御権と回答帰属を保持する DelegationProcess である。

descriptions.zh: 在合成运行 AgentAsToolInvocation-is_a-DelegationProcess-scenario-001 中，AgentAsToolInvocation 通过“是一种”明确指向 DelegationProcess；记录保留 source→target 方向、谓词和限定条件。 审查定义：智能体作为工具调用 是一种 委派过程。区分特征：智能体作为工具调用是管理者保留控制权和答案归属的一种有界委派过程。

Reviewed definition: agent as tool invocation is a kind of delegation process. Reviewed differentia: Agent-as-tool invocation is a DelegationProcess distinguished by the manager retaining control and answer ownership.

Reviewed differentia: ControlOwnership is a CoordinationOwnershipRecord identifying the actor that controls the next workflow step.

descriptions.zh: ControlOwnership 与 CoordinationOwnershipRecord 同时出现但没有可验证的“是一种”断言；仅共现不能建立该关系。 审查定义：控制归属 是一种 协调归属记录。区分特征：控制归属是以当前下一步控制者为区分内容的一种协调归属记录。
descriptions.en: ControlOwnership and CoordinationOwnershipRecord co-occur without a verifiable is a assertion; co-occurrence alone does not establish this relation. descriptions.ja: ControlOwnership と CoordinationOwnershipRecord は同時に現れますが、検証可能な「の一種である」アサーションがなく、共起だけではこの関係を成立させません。 審査済み定義：制御帰属 は 調整帰属記録 の一種です。審査済みの種差：ControlOwnership は次のワークフローステップを制御する主体を識別する CoordinationOwnershipRecord である。
